title: Network Cable Tester and Modular Crimping Tool for Electronics Repair
description:
The Network Cable Tester accurately identifies the presence or lack of cable continuity and improper wiring. Now you can safely check to ensure that your cables are working up to code and in order. This package deal also includes the 3 in 1 Modular Crimping Tool. Tired of annoyingly long and space-eating Ethernet cables? This tool will safely crimp the cable with precision exactly how you want, allowing for continued and more convenient use of the cable.

Network Cable Tester and Modular Crimping Tool for Electronics Repair

The Network Cable Tester accurately identifies the presence or lack of cable continuity and improper wiring. Now you can safely check to ensure that your cables are working up to code and in order.

Key Features

  • Quick and Accurate Cable Testing
  • Little to No Set Up Required
  • 3 in 1 Modular Crimping Tool
  • Crimp Cables with Ease and Precision

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UNIVERSALTOOL-CABLETESTER-6006N
  • UPC: 060886898627
  • Color: Multi

This package deal also includes the 3 in 1 Modular Crimping Tool. Tired of annoyingly long and space-eating Ethernet cables? This tool will safely crimp the cable with precision exactly how you want, allowing for continued and more convenient use of the cable.
